name: cucumber-playwright-tests
description: UI test automation project using Cucumber (BDD) and Playwright

scripts.open:latest-report: node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='./reports';const f=fs.readdirSync(p).filter(x=>x.endsWith('.html')).sort((a,b)=>fs.statSync(p+'/'+b).mtime-fs.statSync(p+'/'+a).mtime)[0];if(f)require('child_process').exec(`start \"\" \"${p.replace(///g,'\\')}\\${f}\"`);else console.log('❌ Нет отчётов в папке reports');"
scripts.test:report:individual:run: cross-env TEST_ENV=test.individual npx cucumber-js --require features/step_definitions/**/*.js --require features/support/**/*.js features/**/*.feature --format json:reports/test.individual.json
scripts.test:report:business:run: cross-env TEST_ENV=test.business npx cucumber-js --require features/step_definitions/**/*.js --require features/support/**/*.js features/**/*.feature --format json:reports/test.business.json
scripts.test:report:sandbox:individual:run: cross-env TEST_ENV=sandbox.individual npx cucumber-js --require features/step_definitions/**/*.js --require features/support/**/*.js features/**/*.feature --format json:reports/sandbox.individual.json
scripts.test:report:sandbox:business:run: cross-env TEST_ENV=sandbox.business npx cucumber-js --require features/step_definitions/**/*.js --require features/support/**/*.js features/**/*.feature --format json:reports/sandbox.business.json
